description: Get User Grabber is a ProtoFlux node that allows for getting the grabber sphere a user has on a specific BodyNode. will use local user and left hand by default. This node will only give an output for ``LeftHand`` or ``RightHand`` BodyNodes.

fields.User: The user to get a Grabber for.
fields.Node:
The body node on the provided User (User) to find a Grabber on.

Examples: ``LeftHand`` or ``RightHand``
fields.* ([[Type:Grabber|Grabber]]): The user's Grabber on the provided BodyNode (``LeftHand`` or ``RightHand``)
